---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Lukas Mayer's Resumé - His education in Data Science/Cognitive Science/Statistics, awards, experience in conducting cutting-edge research, programming and project management skills, and scientific publications."
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
.description {
    display: none;
}
</style>


::: {.panel-tabset}
## Academic
If you can't see the embedded PDF below, you can download it [here](cv_lwm.pdf).

![](cv_lwm.pdf){width=1000 height=1000}

## Industry

TBD

:::
